author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit e90ac07 (amended to include Cargo.lock for the new ripsed-cli regex dep). RangeSpec{Lines|Patterns}+PatternRange in IR; engine RangeFilter implements sed /start/,/end/ semantics (end never tested on the opening line so /a/,/a/ spans to next match; boundaries inclusive; multiple regions; unclosed->EOF; invalid range regex -> invalid_regex). engine::apply signature now Option<RangeSpec> — call-site migration partly dogfooded via ripsed. CLI --range with parse-time regex validation, conflicts -n/-U; JSON options.range mutually exclusive with line_range, validated up front; works in file/pipe/script/json modes via OpOptions::range_spec(). Facade ApplyOptions.line_range -> range (breaking, changelogged). 19 new tests; one initial test expectation was wrong about close-boundary semantics and the code was right — fixed the test, kept sed behavior. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
